element_introduction_order.mastery_context: starter weapon for initial police encounters
converting civilians/scientists to act as cannon fodder or intelligence assets
escalation against rival syndicate agents and police forces
replacing fallen agents; managing 1-4 person teams
balancing resource generation against risk of uprising
unlocking advanced weapons and cybernetic upgrades
confronting heavily armed rival syndicate operatives
tactical situational awareness and agent survival
final missions against elite rival agents and Atlantic Accelerator finale
strategic confrontation with The Tao, Sphinx Inc., The Castrilos
maintaining corporate control amid internal threats

typical_relief_triggers: conquering new territory and establishing taxation income
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: escalating mission difficulty with periodic resource management breaks; tension builds through agent attrition and rival threat progression; relief through acquisition of superior weaponry and territory expansion

difficulty_curve.early_game: introduction to basic tactics with police forces; simple assassination/persuasion objectives; minimal agent losses expected
difficulty_curve.mid_game: escalation to rival syndicate agents with heavy weaponry; complex multi-objective missions; sustained agent attrition requiring recruitment strategy
difficulty_curve.late_game: confrontation with elite rival operatives; mutiny suppression; climactic wave-based encounter at Atlantic Accelerator research station
notable_spikes: first encounter with rival syndicate agents
transition from local police to organized crime syndicates
Atlantic Accelerator finale: wave upon wave of enemy agents

notable_level_patterns.description: Missions structured around capturing control of specific countries; each territory conquered adds recurring taxation income; over-taxation triggers revolt mission requiring replay to recapture territory
notable_level_patterns.example_level: mission-based country assignments across global map

notable_level_patterns.description: Individual missions range from assassination, infiltration, theft, and persuasion; keeps tactical approach variable; forces player adaptation to different enemy compositions
notable_level_patterns.example_level: generic mission types applicable across territories

notable_level_patterns.description: Progression from local police forces → rival syndicate agents → elite operatives; each tier requires superior weaponry and tactical coordination to overcome
Limited funds force prioritization between weapon upgrades, cybernetic enhancements, and agent recruitment; taxation balancing act creates strategic tension
notable_level_patterns.example_level: ongoing economic management across all missions

notable_level_patterns.description: Finale involves defending against sustained waves of enemy agents at Atlantic Accelerator station; culmination of accumulated power versus overwhelming force
